top_signals.title: Brent oil erases wartime gains as Hormuz reopening boosts supply
top_signals.summary: The global benchmark pushed lower for a fourth session, dropping below $72.48 a barrel — its pre-war closing price — before fluctuating around that level.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee release economic projections from the June 16-17 FOMC meeting
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee release economic projections from the June 16-17 FOMC meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve notes with deep sadness the passing of Alan Greenspan
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve notes with deep sadness the passing of Alan Greenspan

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls back under $60,000, hitting its lowest level since October 2024
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin, now in the eighth month of its bear market, dropped to an October 2024 low amid a pullback in tech stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Halfords revs up garage growth to return to profit
top_signals.summary: Halfords has smashed analyst expectations to turn a £44m profit, in a sign that the motoring and cycling retailer’s turnaround is beginning to gain pace. The company notched a £43.6m pre-tax profit in the year to April, returning to the black after last year’s £30m loss, as revenue grew five per cent to £1.8bn. Analysts [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Buildings collapse as quakes rock Venezuela, killing at least 32
top_signals.summary: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake hit about 160 kilometers west of Caracas on Wednesday afternoon, followed less than a minute later by a ​magnitude 7.5 temblor.
